etymology_and_history.root_language: Language**: From "enjoy" + "-ment" from Old French "enjoir" (to give joy to)
etymology_and_history.original_meaning: Meaning**: Giving joy to; having pleasurable satisfaction and enjoyment pleasure with joyful presence
etymology_and_history.semantic_evolution: Evolution**: Give joy → pleasurable satisfaction → contemporary enjoyment pleasure and enjoyment satisfaction with joyful presence
etymology_and_history.cultural_shifts: Shifts**: Give joy → pleasurable satisfaction → enjoyment pleasure → joyful understanding
